title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-protocol
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-protocol with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 10 warnings. Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, missing_errors_doc.

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge-protocol --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues; only allow specific lints with a one-line justification.
- All existing tests still pass (cargo test -p crossbridge-protocol).
- cargo fmt --check clean.
- Cast-truncation warnings: prefer u32::try_from(...)? at wire-protocol boundaries; allow cast_possible_truncation only where bounds are statically guaranteed (with a comment).
